title: The Bouncy Bridge
cover_description: Pip and Boomy stuck in a tree, surrounded by confused birds, while the "bridge" dangles below like a broken trampoline.
host_intro: Tonight, Pip tries to cross Boomy’s new bridge. It’s very bouncy.
host_outro: Boomy’s bridge is now a trampoline. He’s still bouncing.
script:
[TITLE: The Bouncy Bridge]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Pip tries to cross Boomy’s new bridge. It’s very bouncy.]
[HOST_OUTRO: Boomy’s bridge is now a trampoline. He’s still bouncing.]
[AGE: 2-5]
[VOICES: high_pitch_cartoon, comedic_villain, musical_original]
[COMEDY_TYPE: sound_effect]

[SETUP]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: gentle, wistful] Welcome to the riverbank, little adventurers.
[PIP] [DELIVERY: curious, excited] Ooooh! What’s this long wobbly thing over the water?
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: confident, triumphant] It is my magnificent bridge, tiny one! Step right up! [STING: musical_flourish]
[/SETUP]

[BEAT_1]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: tentative] I’m stepping… oh! It’s wobbling like jelly!
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: dismissive] Nonsense! It’s sturdy as a mountain! Keep walking!
[PIP] [DELIVERY: panicked] I’m walking… but now I’m bouncing! Up, up, up! [STING: boing]
[/BEAT_1]

[BEAT_2]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] What? No! My bridge does not bounce!
[PIP] [DELIVERY: excited] I bounced over the river! And now I’m bouncing back! Wheee! [STING: boing]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: defensive] That’s just… a special feature!
[PIP] [DELIVERY: suspicious] You said it was a bridge, not a trampoline!
[/BEAT_2]

[BEAT_3]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] Fine! Step off! Step off now!
[PIP] [DELIVERY: delighted] Too late! I bounced you up too! Look at us go! [STING: big_crash]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: stunned] I’m flying! I’m a bird! I’m… oh no.
[PIP] [DELIVERY: calm gotcha] We’re stuck in a tree. Together. [STING: silence]
[/BEAT_3]

[BUTTON]
[BOOMY] [DELIVERY: deflated, quiet] [PUNCHLINE]My magnificent bridge is now a bird’s nest.[/PUNCHLINE] [STING: deflation]
[PIP] [DELIVERY: gentle, wistful] At least we’re high up. [STING: sweet_pause]
[/BUTTON]

[COVER: Pip and Boomy stuck in a tree, surrounded by confused birds, while the "bridge" dangles below like a broken trampoline.]
[PREMISE: Bridge turns into a trampoline]
